page, using a flex column layout so the map fills the remaining viewport
height below the nav.

EOF

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add components/map/MapClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace map markers with emoji Star of David circles

Regular markers now use a colored SVG circle \(status color\) with the ✡️
emoji centered inside. The focused/bouncing marker uses the same emoji
in a larger yellow circle \(48px vs 32px\), preserving the existing bounce
animation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin master)

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add components/map/MapClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Restore status color visibility on map markers

Add darker border colors per status so both fill and stroke are coded.
Shrink emoji from 15px to 11px \(regular\) and 26px to 20px \(focused\) so
the colored ring is clearly visible around the star.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin master)

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add app/page.tsx app/synagogues/page.tsx components/synagogues/SynagoguesClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Make homepage stat boxes link to synagogues page with filters

562 box links to /synagogues \(all\). 83 Active box links to
/synagogues?status=active. SynagoguesClient now reads the status param
from the URL to initialize the filter on load. Wrapped SynagoguesClient
in Suspense as required by Next.js when useSearchParams is used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin master)

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add app/map/page.tsx components/map/MapClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add map sidebar with search, neighborhood filter, and synagogue detail panel

- Left sidebar \(320px\) with name/rabbi search and neighborhood dropdown
- Filtered markers update live as search/filter changes
- Clicking a marker shows "View Details in Sidebar" button in infowindow
- SynagoguePanel shows status badge, years, address, rabbis, Street View link, and full history link
- Arriving from detail page via ?id= param auto-populates sidebar
- Enable streetViewControl \(pegman\) on map
- Fetch rabbis data in map page Supabase query

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add components/map/MiniMap.tsx components/synagogues/SynagogueDetail.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add mini-map to synagogue detail page hero section

- New MiniMap component renders a non-interactive Google Maps preview
  \(208x160px\) in the hero box, color-coded by status with the same
  SVG Star of David marker style used on the full map page
- Mini-map is clickable and links to the full map focused on that synagogue
- Falls back to the existing "View on Map" button when no coordinates exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add app/globals.css components/map/MapClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace single year slider with dual-range year filter on map

- Two-thumb range slider lets users set a start and end year
- Map shows synagogues whose operational period overlaps the selected
  range \(founded <= endYear && closed >= startYear\)
- Defaults to full range \(1745–2024\) showing all data points
- Custom CSS in globals.css handles transparent tracks and pointer-events
  so both thumbs work independently on the same track

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(cd "/Users/dflax/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Source/phila-historical-synagogues" && git add components/map/MapClient.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Make map sidebar collapsible with hamburger toggle

- Desktop \(≥640px\): sidebar open by default, collapses inline via
  width transition so the map expands to fill the space
- Mobile \(<640px\): sidebar closed by default, slides in as an
  absolute overlay with a semi-transparent backdrop; tapping the
  backdrop closes it
- Hamburger \(☰\) / close \(✕\) toggle button anchored to top-left of
  the map area, always visible
- "View Details in Sidebar" infowindow button now also opens the
  sidebar, ensuring it works correctly on mobile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

of the sidebar header so users can always collapse it on mobile.
